ModMetaData.name: Rim Prison
ModMetaData.author: 乐织终,Akano
ModMetaData.description:
RimPrison provides a complete prisoner management system for your colony. Main features: Simple door access management Dynamic economy system and prisoner thinking system Prisoner schedules, labor, recreation, meals, wages, and debt system Food and apparel whitelists with batch management Prison suppression system, mental breaks, prison breaks, and turret deterrence rules
RimPrison 为你的殖民地提供一套完整的囚犯管理系统。 主要功能： 简易门禁管理 动态经济系统与囚犯思想系统 囚犯时间表、劳动、娱乐、饮食、工资与欠债系统 食物、服装白名单与批量管理 监狱压制度系统、精神崩溃、越狱与炮塔威慑规则
